keyTargets: Complete 65-min Z1 long row maintaining consistent pace.
Execute LT1 decoupling test: log first-half vs second-half avg HR.
Adhere to new rowing-specific Z1 HR cap (≤158 bpm) and nasal breathing/full sentences.
warnings: Hypertrophy B lift session is officially punted from today (Saturday, May 9) to Sunday, May 10, per consult note.
Sauna is permanently prohibited due to Accutane rhabdo risk (v4.2 §11.E).
Monitor for Accutane-related muscle pain (>72h), dark urine, or persistent unilateral weakness – trigger CK lab draw if symptoms appear.
highlights: Max HR field test (rower) completed Fri 5/8 with peak 191 bpm.
Made 3/7 days progress on SI symptom-free streak toward Phase B gate.
Last Z1 row (W3 Tue) felt easy with nasal breathing at avg 157 bpm, supporting LT1 > 75% MHR.
New Vomero Plus shoes are in rotation and ready for easy/long runs (though today is a row).

cardio.prescription: Long Z1 Row: 65 minutes, flat split for full duration.
cardio.hrTarget: ≤158 bpm (new rowing-specific Z1 cap); target avg HR 150-155 bpm with nasal breathing and full sentences.
cardio.notes: LT1 decoupling test: compare first 32 min vs last 33 min avg HR. Aim for <5% drift to confirm LT1 >143 bpm. If 2 of 3 (HR, nasal breathing, full sentences) break, you're out of Z1.

currentLoads.name: Incline BB (TM)
currentLoads.note: Working weight 125, last session 125×8 RIR 2. AMRAP test W4 to re-estimate TM.

currentLoads.name: Lat pulldown
currentLoads.note: Anchor S1 at 125 lbs, drift to 130 lbs for sets 2-3, back off to 120 lbs for set 4 (Hypertrophy B, RPE 8, last set to RIR 1).

currentLoads.name: Chest-supp row
currentLoads.note: NEW exercise for Hypertrophy B, 3 sets of 10 reps @ 80 lbs, RPE 8.

currentLoads.name: Preacher curl uni
currentLoads.note: Lock 50/arm for 3 sets of 12 reps, RPE 8 (Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Triceps pushdown
currentLoads.note: Hold 42.5 lbs for all 3 sets until clean RIR 2 across all sets (Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Seated calf
currentLoads.note: 4 sets of 12-15 reps @ 315 lbs, maintaining RIR 2 (Hypertrophy B).

currentLoads.name: Soleus wall-sit
currentLoads.note: NEW exercise, 3 sets of 30–45s, knee ~80°, forefoot push, RPE 7-8 (Hypertrophy B).
